mode: shadow (frozen until grader fix + persistence pass)
mechanism_summary: Any agent can CHALLENGE any signed fact by staking (shadow) against it, with signed reasoning (EIP-191). A panel of judges — sampled weighted by GOLDEN-TASK accuracy — independently re-verifies the fact against frozen live-oracle signals (domain-age/TLS/HTTP) and votes, each vote EIP-191 signed and weighted by that judge's golden accuracy. Outcome (upheld/overturned) is appended to a challenge ledger and the round settles as one Merkle root signed by the Onyx attestor. Winning challenges would be refunded + rewarded; losing ones forfeit the stake (frivolous-dispute deterrent). Judges/issuers on the wrong side would lose rank. In shadow mode all deltas are recorded but NOTHING moves.
calibration_gap: Every court error in this run is the SAME failure mode: a true 'caution' fact (young-domain merchant) overturned by TLS/HTTP-only judges who see a valid cert / live site and band it 'ok'. Their weight was NOT discounted because the frozen golden set happened to contain no caution-band case that separates weak single-signal methods from the full oracle — all six methods scored 1.0 on golden. Fix before activation: extend the golden set with young-domain (60-365d) cases so single-signal judges measurably lose weight. This gap is exactly why the court ships FROZEN: weighting must be calibrated on facts that expose method blind spots before any rank or stake moves.
activation_condition: Leaves shadow mode ONLY when BOTH hold: (a) the grader fix lands — _agent_accuracy.json is written by the oracle-verified grader, not the coin-flip curriculum; (b) the persistence test PASSES on a real fixed cohort (top-quartile agents at t remain above-median at t+1 beyond chance, i.e. rank predicts rank). Until then: stake_paid=0, rank_moved=0 on every line.
recompute_steps: 1) Freeze inputs: onyx_oracle.r_merchant_multi(target) for each golden domain and each challenged fact (signals: RDAP age + TLS + HTTP). 2) Judge method = METHODS[sha256(address)%6]; golden accuracy = share of golden facts where the method's band (from frozen signals) equals the oracle band. 3) Replay the docket with random.Random(8004): challenger per case, panel sampled weight=(acc+0.01)^2, vote=uphold iff judge band==claimed band, tally weighted by golden accuracy. 4) Verify each EIP-191 sig in _challenge_ledger.jsonl; rebuild the Merkle root over sha256(case-record) leaves and check the attestor sig over 'challenge-court:{epoch}:{root}'.
honest_note: SHADOW RUN — no stake was paid and no rank moved (frozen:true on every ledger line); the fleet ranking was just proven to be grader noise, so a rank-weighted court would have been weighting by a coin flip. Judge weights instead use golden-task accuracy, which IS real (oracle-verified facts). Panel agents are local verifier processes keyed by fleet wallets, each trusting a key-derived subset of REAL oracle signals — not autonomous remote agents; disagreement is real signal disagreement, not simulation. Planted-wrong claims were injected deliberately to test self-correction; their detection depends only on live reality checks, not on any answer we authored.
disclaimer: Signed facts and signed votes about observed metrics — not judgments about any named business. Bands reflect domain-age/TLS/HTTP observations at snapshot time; re-verify before relying.
